_doc: Local Warrant consumer policy for maiwang-claude. The shared reference policy lives at cross-team/warrant/reference/policy.json (do not edit — it is a submodule); this file is OUR consumer policy, run via `python3 cross-team/warrant/reference/_check_frontmatter.py --policy cross-team/policy.json`. It points Warrant at this repo's .plan/ document root and at the shared artifact_types registry for the drift check.
